claims.claim: `write_projection_epoch_payload_atomic` can race during first initialization and overwrite or lose a concurrently-created valid projection epoch.
claims.rationale: Replaced the clobbering install path with a no-clobber hard-link/create-new copy install, preserving existing valid epochs and still repairing corrupt files; added a concurrent-valid-epoch regression test.

claims.claim: The codec projection epoch should remain stable across fresh runtime starts and existing epoch files should take precedence after restart.
claims.rationale: Ran existing epoch stability and existing-file precedence tests after the no-clobber install change.

claims.claim: Tail vibrancy should be smooth around entropy 0.85/0.86 rather than snapping or flattening.
claims.rationale: Ran existing smoothstep and tail-vibrancy threshold tests covering the requested gate points.

claims.claim: The activation-gain/dimension-scale attenuation boundary should remain transparent and deterministic.
claims.rationale: Verified the codec stability and tail-vibrancy tests still pass with the deterministic projection and bounded attenuation path intact; no live gain or control change was made.
